subject: Marshmallow from Disney's Frozen — a massive ice snow-golem creature roaring with mouth open, depicted in blue-white crystalline form
description: An enormous ice creature fills the frame with dynamic force — a snow golem or frost monster with a massive open roaring mouth lined with icy spike-like teeth. The creature's body is composed of blue-white ice and snow, with crystalline spikes and frost emanating outward. A tiny figure appears above or behind the creature at much smaller scale, suggesting the creature's overwhelming size. The overall impression is raw, wild cold power — a creation of magical winter that has taken on a life and temper of its own. The roaring pose and wide-open mouth leave no ambiguity about mood.
foreground: Massive blue-white ice snow-golem creature with open roaring mouth and crystalline spikes
background: Swirling ice and snow, pale blue-white atmospheric haze
